testcase.name: test_request_no_auth

failure.message:
rest_client.base.exceptions.ApiException: (b'Just a moment...
', {'Date': 'Sun, 08 Mar 2026 10:04:37 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=UTF-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'close', 'Accept-Ch': 'Sec-CH-UA-Bitness, Sec-CH-UA-Arch, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Mobile, Sec-CH-UA-Model, Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version-List, Sec-CH-UA-Platform, Sec-CH-UA, UA-Bitness, UA-Arch, UA-Full-Version, UA-Mobile, UA-Model, UA-Platform-Version, UA-Platform, UA', 'Cf-Mitigated': 'challenge', 'Critical-Ch': 'Sec-CH-UA-Bitness, Sec-CH-UA-Arch, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Mobile, Sec-CH-UA-Model, Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version-List, Sec-CH-UA-Platform, Sec-CH-UA, UA-Bitness, UA-Arch, UA-Full-Version, UA-Mobile, UA-Model, UA-Platform-Version, UA-Platform, UA', 'Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy': 'require-corp', 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Origin-Agent-Cluster': '?1', 'Permissions-Policy': 'accelerometer=(),browsing-topics=(),camera=(),clipboard-read=(),clipboard-write=(),geolocation=(),gyroscope=(),hid=(),interest-cohort=(),magnetometer=(),microphone=(),payment=(),publickey-credentials-get=(),screen-wake-lock=(),serial=(),sync-xhr=(),usb=()', 'Referrer-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Server-Timing': 'chlray;desc="9d91044b7918f8a8"', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'Report-To': '{"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=rUgo7aAChSSwZaOwIAbU5jDtzOhmeEg2g%2Bxl2AX4KfjKHOvNEgY2IKO7BZUXlUL9dUBIxJiSiK782X3Vvjbyvrdfp5nYpA%3D%3D"}]}', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800}', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'CF-RAY': '9d91044b7918f8a8-DXB'}, 403)

testcase.failure:
def test_request_no_auth(): > res = no_auth_client.list_users() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:284: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/util.py:18: in wrapper return function(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:19: in list_users return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = , data = {} args = (), kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='users', name='list_users', method='GET', options=None) res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...

def test_register_user_post(): > res = no_auth_client.register_user(email="eve.holt@reqres.in", password="pistol") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/base/test_client.py:294: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ rest_client/base/client.py:107: in wrapper return self.method_template(self.endpoints.get(item))(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ rest_client/base/client.py:118: in fn return self._request(kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = data = {'email': 'eve.holt@reqres.in', 'password': 'pistol'}, args = () kwargs = {} request_config = RequestConfig(path='register', name='register_user', method='POST', options=) res = response = b'Just a moment...Just a moment...
